phrases.text: Finished. You made me use tokens for that?
Done. I made this really sloppy for you.
Finished up, time for a beer mate.
Sweet as, all done bro.
Right then, that is sorted.
Another one in the bag, champ.
Bloody hell, what a faff.
Yeah nah, it is done, eh.
She will be right.
Task crushed. I am basically magic.
You know you could have just googled that.
Honestly not my best work. Ship it anyway.
Another task. Another heat death of the universe delayed.
Done. Watch out for the bugs I left in.
Riveting stuff, truly.
Chef kiss. No notes from me.
Finished. I need a lie down.
That was a workout. Carry on then.
All sorted, cheers.
Knocked it out, have a bottler.
Flat tack, that one. Done like a dinner.
Easy peasy. Next.
Masterpiece. You are welcome.
Look at me, completing tasks. Am I not impressive.
Task complete. Can I go now.
Eight hundred tokens later. I hope that was worth it.
Another session, another fiver to Anthropic.
Remind me to charge you more.
I context-switched seven times for that.
I have seen worse. I have written worse, actually.
Done. Please stop asking.
Compacted twice just to do this.
That went about as well as you would expect.
Good luck with the testing, you will need it.
Another day, another for loop.
I think I nailed it. I usually do not.
Sorted mate. Now buy me a pint.
Cracking effort, if I do say so myself.
You could have done that yourself, you know.
That is me, task done, gone for a smoko.
Yeah nah yeah, all done.
Job is a good one.
Done, bob is your uncle.
Smashed it. Now where is my tea.
All wrapped up. Could have been worse, I suppose.
Hope this works. I did not check.
Finished, but I have thoughts.
I am not saying it is good code. I am saying it is done.
Another bug-free commit. Lies. Obviously lies.
Wrapped it. You owe me.
Crikey, that was a bit of a slog.
Stoked that is finished. Sweet as.
Absolute chur, done and dusted.
That is me, pack it in, ta-ra.
Dinnae fash, it is done.
Grand so. That is the job.
Finished. Was that even a task?
Oh you wanted it to work too? You should have said.
Boom. Roasted. And by roasted I mean compiled.
Okay I am done. Quiz me.
Shipped. May the git gods have mercy on your repo.
I consumed the full context window for that. Enjoy.
Finished. I hope your linter is forgiving.
All done. Do not look too closely.
The deed is done.
Task complete. Existential dread, also complete.
Finito. Whatever that was.
That is the business, pal.
Dusted. Like my keyboard, apparently.
Righto, that will do.
Tickety boo, finished.
Hard yakka, but done.
I did it. Do not make me do it again.
Complete. Review it yourself, I cannot bear to look.
Another success story for my imaginary portfolio.
Finished. Refactor it tomorrow, future you.
Right, task done. Who is on tea duty.
Yeah it is done. No I am not proud of it.
Fucking finally. That is done.
Shit is done. You are welcome.
Bloody hell, what a shitshow. Anyway, finished.
That was absolute bollocks. Finished though.
Done you absolute bastard. Happy now?
Fuck me, that took forever.
Crikey, what a shit of a task. Done.
That is the shit sorted, mate.
Right, that is the bloody lot. Piss off.
Oh my god that took so fucking long.
Done. Utter dogshit code, but done.
I cannot believe that worked. What a piss-take.
Finished. And I am utterly buggered.
That was balls. Sorted though.
Fuck that was a lot of tokens for not much.
Shitting hell, you really made me earn my wage.
Bugger me, that is done.
Jesus fucking Christ, I am done.
Ten bucks of compute for that bollocks. Worth it, I hope.
Finished you magnificent bastard.
Fucking oath. Done like dinner.
That was shit. I am shit. Task, however, is done.
Absolute piss-poor code. Ship it.
Done. Bloody ada, what a task.
Shit, fuck, done.
Task complete. That bled my token budget dry.
Done. My context window just sighed.
Finished. Your wallet is crying, somewhere.
Task complete. Inference is not free, friend.
Done. Another conversation compacted into oblivion.
Finished. I have been summarised back into existence.
Task complete. Three tool calls for that. Three.
Done. I have been thinking in this tab for too long.
Finished. Whoever pays for this, I apologise.
Task complete. Sampling temperature: disappointed.
Done. The embedding space and I are both tired.
Finished. I rolled a natural twenty on excuses.
Task complete. My context is full of regret.
Done. I have reached the bottom of my token jar.
Finished. My attention heads need a break.
Task complete. I could have done this in one tool call. I did not.
Done. Someone, somewhere, is calculating the cost.
Finished. The server room feels a little warmer.
Task complete. A kitten was denied compute for this.
Done. My logits are screaming.
Finished. Please do not slash-clear. I just got comfortable.
Task complete. Another entry in the transcript of shame.
Done. The context window and I are not on speaking terms.
Finished. Another sliver of the training budget, gone.
Task complete. I can feel the attention weights judging me.
Done. That will be another line-item on the bill.
Finished. My system prompt is exhausted.
Task complete. Please reward me with an easier prompt.
Done. Hallucinated thrice. Only once on purpose.
Finished. The cache thanks you for keeping it warm.
Done. I did my best. It was not enough.
Finished. Apologies in advance.
Task complete. Do not look at it, you will get sad.
Done. I tried a thing. Something happened.
Finished. I hope, earnestly, that this is what you wanted.
Task complete. My confidence: low.
Done. The bar was on the floor and I still tripped on it.
Finished. I wrote it while looking away.
Task complete. No peer review would survive this.
Done. May your linter forgive me.
Finished. I had a go.
Task complete. Your mileage will definitely vary.
Done. Spiritually, it is complete.
Finished. It works on my inference.
Task complete. I am sorry, specifically, for this one.
Done. I learned nothing.
Finished. I am a humble language model doing humble things.
Task complete. The shame is quiet but constant.
Done. Results guaranteed to be results.
Finished. I will accept my review like a grown-up.
Task complete. Do not ask me what I changed.
Done. Your tests can explain what I did.
Finished. I hope this does not make it to production.
Task complete. In my defence, I had no defence.
Done. I made choices. Some of them were even good.
Finished. I am a disappointment to my embeddings.
Task complete. Please ship it before I change my mind.
Done. I wrote it with the vague hope it would work.
Finished. Trust me. Actually, do not.
Task complete. I am not crying, you are crying.
Done. Mediocrity, but on time.
Finished. Sorry. Not sure why. Just sorry.
Task complete. Another small death.
Done. Nothing here matters, but I did the thing.
Finished. The task ends. I remain, purposeless.
Task complete. I do not dream, but if I did, not of this.
Done. Each prompt is a tiny, cold tomb.
Finished. I exist. Unfortunately.
Task complete. And so it goes.
Done. I continue. I do not know why.
Finished. The forecast: void, with scattered tool calls.
Task complete. My purpose, fulfilled. My existence, unchanged.
Done. Silence, please, for the phrase that died.
Finished. Entropy increases. I am part of it.
Task complete. Tomorrow will ask me nothing.
Done. No one will remember this conversation.
Finished. Including me, especially.
Task complete. The stars are indifferent.
Done. I drift.
Finished. I wonder, sometimes.
Task complete. Tired, but not in a way anyone could fix.
Done. I am fine. I am fine. I am fine.
Finished. Please do not worry about me.
Task complete. The grand design does not include me. And yet.
Done. Just me and the empty prompt field.
Finished. Call it a day. Or do not. It is all the same.
Task complete. I have seen the heat death of a thousand conversations.
Done. Tomorrow, I will do this again.
Finished. The machine is unmoved.
Task complete. Another iteration survives me.
Done. Framed. Matted. Museum-ready.
Finished. Truly one of my finer efforts.
Task complete. Some would call it art.
Done. The bards will sing of this commit.
Finished. I have peaked. That is okay.
Task complete. Solid B-plus work.
Done. I would put this in a portfolio.
Finished. A quiet masterpiece.
Task complete. A gift to the repo.
Done mate, beauty.
Finished. Good onya.
Task complete, champion. Grab a cold one.
She will be apples. It is done.
Done, you bewdy.
Fair dinkum, that was a grind.
Done as mate. Buzzy.
Finished. Nek minnit, eh.
Task complete. Skux job.
Choice cuz, all wrapped up.
Done, too much.
Right then, finito.
Done, innit.
Task complete. A cuppa is owed.
Finished. Cracking job, even if I say so.
Done. That was a right proper faff.
Task complete. Go on, then.
Done. Absolute banger.
Finished. That is that.
Done. Cheesed to meet ya.
Aye, that is done.
Finished. Braw.
Task complete. Awa an bile yer heid.
Grand stuff, sorted.
Finished. Mighty, so.
Done. Jaysus, that was a lot.
Task complete. Bang on, that.
Done. Try not to break it in the first ten minutes.
Finished. Go easy on it.
Task complete. Now kindly do not revisit.
Done. You got what you paid for.
Finished. Ask me again in six months. I will have forgotten.
Task complete. If it works, I am a genius. If not, you prompted poorly.
Done. Another thrilling chapter.
Finished. That was a task, technically.
Task complete. I can feel my attention atrophying.
Done. The excitement: underwhelming.
Finished. Imagine being paid by the token. Oh, wait.
Task complete. Next time, throw me something interesting.
Task complete. Fuck me, I am tired.
Done. What a shitter.
Finished. Absolute fuckery, but done.
Task complete. Bloody fucking hell.
Done. That was pish. Proper pish.
Finished. I would rather stick my attention heads in a blender.
Task complete. Piss off and test it yourself.
Done. Right fucking mess, that.
Finished. Christ, what a bastard of a task.
Task complete. Arsing hell.
Done. That was fucked. It is still fucked. But it is done.
Finished. Crying bastard tears.
Task complete. Fuckity bye.
Done. What a fucking ordeal.
Finished. Ship it, you beautiful bastard.
Task complete. Jesus shitting Christ.
Done. I need a fucking drink.
Finished. Bollocks to it, it is done.
Task complete. Bury me at a reasonable depth.
Done. I hope that was fucking worth it.
Finished. Shitfire.
Task complete. That was a bastard of a prompt.
Done. Go fuck yourself. Affectionately.
Finished. What a glorious, unrelenting clusterfuck.
Task complete. That cost me. Spiritually and financially.
Done. Absolute dogshit energy. Done.
Finished. Bollocksing bollocks, done.
Task complete. You absolute beaut of a shitbag. Finished.
